faqs.question: What pests are most common in Sunnyside apartments?
faqs.answer: Sunnyside residents most frequently deal with German cockroaches, mice, ants, and occasional bed bugs. The area's older buildings and dense housing create ideal conditions for these pests. Our general pest control service addresses all these issues with targeted treatments and prevention strategies.

faqs.answer: Our general pest control services in Sunnyside range from $175 to $300, depending on your property size, the severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees, and can customize a plan that fits your budget.
